artifacts.summary: Identifies that README.md, docs/README.md, docs/general/README.md, docs/general/R.md, docs/general/python.md, docs/workflows/README.md, and docs/agent-system/README.md need reframing from macOS/epidemiology focus to R+Python+Claude Code in Zed, with dual-platform (Linux+macOS) notes and cross-links to the existing R.md and python.md language guides.

summary: Research report written: 7 user-facing doc files need reframing from macOS/epidemiology to R/Python with Claude Code in Zed; R.md and python.md already exist but are orphaned from top-level navigation; platform framing conflicts with settings.json NixOS Linux declaration.
